---
title: ""
author: ""
date: 
format: 
   revealjs:
    slide-number: c/t
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    theme: simple
    incremental: true
    scrollable: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
editor: visual
---

## Background

## Data source

## Research question 

## Study design

## Study population

## Objective

## Exposure

## Primary outcome

## Secondary outcome

## Variables of interest

## weighting variables

## References
